title: Squirrel Removal West Farms Bronx | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC

intro: West Farms residents know that squirrels can quickly turn from charming park visitors to destructive pests when they invade homes and buildings. Our professional squirrel removal services in West Farms provide safe, humane, and effective solutions to eliminate squirrel infestations in attics, walls, and crawl spaces. With pricing ranging from $900 to $2,500, we offer comprehensive removal, exclusion, and prevention services tailored to West Farms properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served West Farms homeowners and businesses for years with certified technicians who understand the unique challenges of Bronx wildlife control. We combine humane trapping methods with permanent exclusion solutions, backed by our satisfaction guarantee and rapid response times throughout the West Farms neighborhood.
localContext: West Farms' mix of historic homes near Bronx Park and multi-family buildings along Boston Road creates ideal entry points for squirrels seeking shelter, especially during fall and winter months. The neighborhood's proximity to the Bronx Zoo and Bronx Park means abundant squirrel populations that often find their way into attics, eaves, and roof vents of local properties.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in West Farms?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in West Farms typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes inspection, humane trapping, removal, entry point sealing, and sanitation. We provide free estimates for all West Farms properties.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my West Farms home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying noises in the attic or walls, especially during early morning or dusk, visible entry holes near the roofline, chewed wood or wires, droppings in the attic, and squirrels seen entering or exiting your roof. West Farms homeowners often notice increased activity during nesting seasons in spring and fall.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my West Farms property?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaging insulation, gnawing on wood structures, and contaminating attics with urine and feces. They can also carry parasites and diseases. Quick removal is essential to prevent costly repairs to your West Farms home.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to squirrel problems in West Farms?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to West Farms residents in most cases. Our team understands that squirrel infestations require urgent attention, and we prioritize rapid response throughout the Bronx. Call us in the morning, and we can typically have a technician at your West Farms property that afternoon.
